zh.lifeSummary: 當comte Bernard III dit Dodon de Comminges於大約1120年出生在法國米迪-列內斯可明格斯時，他的父親Bernard DE COMMINGES31歲，母親dame Diaz de Muret dame de Samatan22歲。他於1150年與Laurence de TOULOUSE結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1181年在法國享年62歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Comminges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Cummings
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): variant of Cumming , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Bernard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was the name of three famous medieval churchmen: St Bernard of Menthon ( 923–1008 ), founder of a hospice on each of the Alpine passes named after him; the monastic reformer St Bernard of Clairvaux ( 1090–1153 ); and the scholastic philosopher Bernard of Chartres. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. A native Old English form, Beornheard, was superseded by the Norman form.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

nameMeanings.name: dit
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

nameMeanings.name: Dodon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Apparently a variant of Dorian (perhaps influenced by the names Damian and Damon ), although it corresponds in form with the Greek word dōron ‘gift’. As a Jewish name, it is a modern coinage borrowed directly from the Greek.

en.lifeSummary: When comte Bernard III dit Dodon de Comminges was born about 1120, in Comminges, Midi-Pyrénées, France, his father, Bernard DE COMMINGES, was 31 and his mother, dame Diaz de Muret dame de Samatan, was 22. He married Laurence de TOULOUSE in 1150. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1181, in France, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque comte Bernard III dit Dodon de Comminges est né environ 1120, à Comminges, Midi-Pyrénées, France, son père, Bernard DE COMMINGES, avait 31 ans et sa mère, dame Diaz de Muret dame de Samatan, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Laurence de TOULOUSE en 1150. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1181, à France, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als comte Bernard III dit Dodon de Comminges um 1120 in Comminges, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bernard DE COMMINGES 31 und seine Mutter dame Diaz de Muret dame de Samatan 22. Er hat 1150 Laurence de TOULOUSE geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1181 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando comte Bernard III dit Dodon de Comminges è nato il circa 1120 nel Comminges, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia, il suo padre, Bernard DE COMMINGES, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, dame Diaz de Muret dame de Samatan, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Laurence de TOULOUSE nel 1150. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1181, nel Francia, all'età di 62 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: comte Bernard III dit Dodon de Comminges(이)가 대략 1120년 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 코밍스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bernard DE COMMINGES(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 dame Diaz de Muret dame de Samatan(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1150년 Laurence de TOULOUSE(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1181년 프랑스에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando comte Bernard III dit Dodon de Comminges nasceu aproximadamente 1120, em Comminges, Midi-Pyrénées, França, seu pai, Bernard DE COMMINGES, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, dame Diaz de Muret dame de Samatan, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Laurence de TOULOUSE em 1150. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1181, em França, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда comte Bernard III dit Dodon de Comminges родился около 1120 г. в местности коммингесь, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Bernard DE COMMINGES было 31 год, а матери, которую звали dame Diaz de Muret dame de Samatan, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Laurence de TOULOUSE в 1150 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1181 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando comte Bernard III dit Dodon de Comminges nació aproximadamente 1120, en Comminges, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia, su papá, Bernard DE COMMINGES, tenía 31 años y su mamá, dame Diaz de Muret dame de Samatan, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Laurence de TOULOUSE en 1150. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1181, en Francia, a la edad de 62 años.
